name: Abid TS
bio: Founder at AyraSoft. Building full-stack web applications, PWAs, and applied AI systems.

projects.name: KeralaVipani
projects.description: A crowdsourced Progressive Web App (PWA) for tracking real-time commodity market rates across all 14 districts of Kerala. Built with React, Firebase, and Firestore, featuring secure maker-checker verification workflows, real-time updates, advanced filtering, and offline-first mobile support.

projects.name: DentOS
projects.description: A comprehensive dental practice management platform built with React and Java. Features appointment scheduling, patient record management, treatment tracking, and an integrated doctor dashboard designed to streamline daily clinical operations.

projects.name: Poultry Shield AI
projects.description: A multimodal AI diagnostic platform for poultry farmers combining CNN-based image analysis, acoustic disease detection, disease hotspot mapping, and an AI-powered advisory assistant.

projects.name: LookLock
projects.description: A computer vision-powered retail security and loss-prevention system that identifies customers, extracts visual attributes, and verifies purchases against POS transactions using edge AI.

projects.name: LaunDry Today
projects.description: A hyper-local weather intelligence PWA that predicts laundry drying conditions using a custom algorithm based on temperature, humidity, and wind-speed data from real-time weather APIs.

projects.name: AQI Navigator
projects.description: A machine learning-powered air quality prediction platform that combines NASA TEMPO satellite data with ground sensor readings to forecast AQI and provide health-risk insights.

projects.name: Gym Management PWA
projects.description: A full-stack gym management solution featuring membership tracking, payment management, attendance monitoring, and an administrative dashboard built with Firebase.
